# Copilot Instructions 

## Project fundamentals
- Simple SPA web page that should be runnable in github pages. 
- ONLY client side JS that is supported by github pages. 

## Project goal and some visual guidelines
- This will be a CV web page, decorated with some cute and actually functional details.
- The page should be usable in desktop and mobile. 
- The visual appearence of the page should have a center panel with single colour background that is responsive to the season and time of day, using time zone of Helsinki, Finland. 
- "Behind" that panel should be a background that has some CSS pixel art visualizing the scene. You'll get the more detailed instructions as we develop the page.
- Later also some weather responsive CSS will be added.
- When user scrolls the page, the panel contents move, but the pixel art CSS background does not. 
- On top of that panel will be some banner & picture, lets refine this later. 
- On the bottom of the panel there should be a banner that tells that the theme is based on your current season & time of day. There should also be a button for browsing the themes. 

## Rules for editing the code
- This project is a SPA that can be hosted and run in GitHub Pages, so always take into account what can or cannot be run there. 
- Always ask permission before adding new dependencies/frameworks or if you try to use other tools/frameworks than mentioned in this document or already existing in code. 
- Do not try to do everything at once, proceed with with small steps.
